nasb.text: For zeal for Your house has consumed me, And the reproaches of those who reproach You have fallen on me.

esv.text: For zeal for your house has consumed me, and the reproaches of those who reproach you have fallen on me.

cnv.text: 因我為你的殿，心中迫切如同火燒； 辱罵你的人的辱罵，都落在我身上。

ccb.text: 我对你的殿充满炙热的爱， 辱骂你之人的辱骂都落在我身上。

csbs.text: 然而我为你的殿，心火焚烧； 辱骂你之人的辱骂都落在我身上。
